settings.label: Use brand colors
settings.info: When enabled, cart uses your brand colors automatically. Disable to customize colors manually.

settings.label: Progress bar message
settings.default: Spend [amount] more to get FREE shipping!
settings.info: Use '[amount]' to display the amount needed to reach the goal.

settings.content: Use the cart progress bar for shipping or other cart promotions. The progress bar will show a success message once the customer reaches the set goal. Make sure to set up an [automatic discount](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/discounts/automatic-discounts).

settings.label: Base the goal on
settings.info: Determines if the goal will be based on the total cart subtotal price, or the total quantity of items added to cart.

settings.label: Progress bar goal
settings.info: This should be the required cart sub-total for the promotion.

settings.label: Display compare prices based on
settings.info: Determines how the displayed compare prices of the items are caluclated. If "Cart discounts" is selected, compare prices won't be displayed unless there is a Product discount for the item. "Real product compare price" displays the compare price as item quantity * real product compare price. "Automatic" is the combination of the first two options. If an automatic discount is active, that's going to be displayed. Otherwise, the real compare price of the product will be taken into calculation.

settings.label: Displayed variants style
settings.info: Example for Classic: Color: Green, Size: S. Example for compact: Green / S

settings.label: Custom payment badges to show
settings.info: List of payments you want to show, split with a comma. Options are: afterpay, american_express, apple_pay, bitcoin, dankort, diners_club, discover, dogecoin, dwolla, facebook_pay, forbrugsforeningen, google_pay, ideal, jcb, klarna, klarna-pay-later, litecoin, maestro, master, paypal, shopify_pay, sofort, unionpay, visa

settings.label: Display the Continue shopping button link when the cart is empty
Continue shopping button custom link
settings.info: If empty, a link to all products will be applied.

settings.label: Display discounted single item prices
settings.info: Displays a price of a single item with a discount badge (under the title) if a Product discount is applied.

settings.label: Cart drawer collection
settings.info: The collection to display in the cart drawer

settings.label: Authentication token
settings.info: Refresh the page if the error message doesnt disappear after entering your token.

settings.label: Disable copying text, downloading images and opening Inspect element
Country list function
settings.info: "Block" blocks selected countries from the list, "Whitelist" only allows the countries from the list.

settings.label: Country codes list
settings.info: Country codes in Alpha-2 code format, split by comma. View all country codes [here](https://www.iban.com/country-codes). Example: "US, GB"

settings.label: Country invalid error message
settings.default: Unfortunately this store isn't available in your country.

settings.label: Secondary logo
settings.info: Used for the transparent header option, if needed.

settings.info: t:settings_schema.logo.settings.favicon.info

settings.info: t:settings_schema.colors.settings.colors_accent_1.info

settings.info: t:settings_schema.colors.settings.colors_outline_button_labels.info

settings.label: t:settings_schema.typography.settings.type_header_font.label
settings.info: t:settings_schema.typography.settings.type_header_font.info

settings.label: Custom font link
settings.info: Upload the font file to Shopify admin > Content > Files. The file name must not have any spaces, hyphens, underscores etc.

settings.label: Custom font name
settings.info: Doesn't have to be identical to file name, just unique.

settings.label: t:settings_schema.typography.settings.type_body_font.label
settings.info: t:settings_schema.typography.settings.type_body_font.info

settings.label: Custom font link
settings.info: Upload the font file to Shopify admin > Content > Files. The file name must not have any spaces, hyphens, underscores etc.

settings.label: Custom font name
settings.info: Doesn't have to be identical to file name, just unique.

settings.label: OPTIONAL: Custom bold font link
settings.info: If your custom body font file doesn't automatically include the bold version in it, upload it separately and paste the URL here.

settings.label: Enable RTL writing direction for all languages
Languages to enable RTL on
settings.info: If you only want to enable RTL on certain store languages, put the codes of those languages into this setting and split them with a comma. Find the language codes using the setting below.

settings.label: Display added store languages & their codes
Enable section load animations
settings.info: Display load animations when the section comes into the viewport.

settings.label: Repeat load animations
settings.info: If checked, the laod animation will be played each time the section comes into viewport.

settings.label: t:settings_schema.badges.settings.position.label
settings.info: Badge position for product cards is adjusted separately in Theme settings > Product cards

settings.label: Sale badge text
settings.info: Use [percentage] to display the percentage saved and [amount] to display the amount of money saved.

settings.label: Predefined custom colors
settings.info: These predefined colors are used in color swatches in collectoin cards. And, they can also be used on product pages. To define multiple colors, go into a new line.

settings.label: Push badge to the side
settings.info: Applied unless Badge position is set to Top center.

settings.label: Custom badges list
settings.info: Predefined custom badges list, split by comma. [percentage] and [amount] for dynamic savings are available.
